title: Future Continuous
usage: Действие будет происходить в определенный момент в будущем
То, что будет происходить когда произойдет другое действие

rules.example: I will be studying this time tomorrow.

videoQuiz1.text: “I guess I’ll be practicing for another half hour.” William means…
options: He will spend another half hour practicing.
He will start practicing in 30 minutes.
videoQuiz1.explanation: When he says “I’ll be practicing,” he is describing an activity that will be in progress in the future.

videoQuiz1.text: Is the speaker talking about a completed action or a continuous action?
videoQuiz1.explanation: The Future Continuous describes an action that will be ongoing at a specific point in the future — not finished, but in progress.

videoQuiz1.text:
Compare these two sentences:
A: I will practice for an hour.
B: I will be practicing for an hour.
Which sentence sounds like a promise or a decision made at the moment?
videoQuiz1.explanation: The Future Simple (will) is often used for facts, promises, or quick decisions.

videoQuiz1.text: Which sentence emphasizes the duration or the “process” of the activity?
videoQuiz1.explanation: The Future Continuous (will be -ing) focuses on the activity itself taking place over a period of time.

videoQuiz1.text:
Look at the sentences:
“How much longer will you be practicing? I will be practicing for another half hour.”
What two “helping” verbs are repeated in each sentence?
videoQuiz1.explanation: The auxiliary phrase in the Future Continuous is always will be.

videoQuiz1.text: Does “will be” change according to the subjects (I, You, He, or They)?
videoQuiz1.explanation:
In the Future Continuous, the auxiliary verbs “will be” stay the same for every person.
I will be driving home after 2 hours.
They will be eating dinner tomorrow at this time.

videoQuiz1.text: What form is the main verb in the sentences?
videoQuiz1.explanation:
We use the -ing form of the verb for all continuous tenses (Past, Present, and Future).
I am driving  •  I was driving  •  I will be driving

videoQuiz1.text: Put the words in the correct order to describe William’s afternoon:
videoQuiz1.correct: He will be playing the violin at 4:00 PM.

blocks.intro:
We use the Future Continuous for:
  • Actions in progress at a specific time in the future;
  • Parallel future actions.

The word order for positive Future Continuous sentences is SAV-ing
(Subject + will be + verb+ing / present participle).

In the Future Continuous, the auxiliary phrase “will be” never changes. It remains the same regardless of the subject.
SubjectAuxiliary VerbsMain Verb (V-ing)
Iwill bepracticing
Youwill bepracticing
He / She / Itwill bepracticing
Wewill bepracticing
Theywill bepracticing
examples: I will be practicing for another half hour.
They will be waiting for us at the station.
I will be cooking when you will be sleeping.

videoQuiz1c.text: What do we add to the auxiliary verb to negate the sentences in the Future Continuous?
videoQuiz1c.explanation: To make the Future Continuous negative, insert not between “will” and “be”: will not be (or the contraction won’t be).

videoQuiz1c.text: Choose the correct negative sentence in the Future Continuous:
videoQuiz1c.explanation:
In negative Future Continuous sentences, not stays between “will” and “be”.
I will not be sleeping at 11 pm.

videoQuiz1c.text: Put the words in the correct order for a question:
videoQuiz1c.correct: Will you be having dinner soon?

videoQuiz1c.text:
Look at the question “How much longer will you be practicing?”
In interrogative Future Continuous sentences the subject stays…
videoQuiz1c.explanation:
In questions, the subject always “sandwiches” itself between “will” and “be”.
Will you be swimming in the pool tomorrow afternoon?

blocks.intro:
Negative Sentences
The word order for negative Future Continuous sentences is SAV-ing
Subject + will not be + verb+ing (present participle).
Contraction: won’t = will not.
examples: I won’t be practicing the violin tomorrow.
They will not be joining us for dinner.

blocks.intro:
Questions
The word order for interrogative Future Continuous sentences is:
Will + subject + be + verb+ing (present participle)?
WH-question words stay at the beginning of the sentence.

Present Participle
For the Future Continuous, you always use the -ing form of the verb.
Base Form (V1)Present Participle (V-ing)Spelling Note
play  /  watchplaying  /  watchingJust add -ing
practice  /  developpracticing  /  developingRemove the ‘e’, add -ing
study  /  enjoystudying  /  enjoyingKeep the ‘y’, add -ing
sit  /  runsitting  /  runningDouble the consonant

videoQuiz1d.text: Practice Affirmative — Choose the correct option:
William says: “I ______ (practice) for another half hour.”
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be practicing — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: While Dad is in the room, William ______ (hold) his violin.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be holding — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: At 5 o’clock today, the boy ______ (play) the same melody.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be playing — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: Dad ______ (stand) near the door during the whole practice.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be standing — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: They ______ (talk) about the music for a while.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be talking — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: If you watch the video again, you ______ (listen) to the violin once more.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be listening — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: William ______ (look) at his music notes for thirty more minutes.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be looking — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: Dad ______ (wait) for his son to finish the lesson.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be waiting — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: The violin ______ (make) a loud sound all evening.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be making — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: After Dad leaves the room, William ______ (stay) there to finish his task.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will be staying — Future Continuous: will be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: Practice Negative — Choose the correct option:
In a year, the girl ______ with her family anymore.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: won’t be living — negative Future Continuous: won’t be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: The student ______ her math homework at home once she is in college.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: won’t be doing — negative Future Continuous: won’t be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: She ______ Harry Potter with her sister every evening next year.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: won’t be reading — negative Future Continuous: won’t be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: The family ______ at the TV together as often after she moves out.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: won’t be laughing — negative Future Continuous: won’t be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: In college, there ______ any family bonding time for her.
videoQuiz1d.explanation: won’t be happening — negative Future Continuous: won’t be + V-ing.

videoQuiz1d.text: Practice Interrogative — Choose the correct option:
______ William ______ the violin for another half hour?
videoQuiz1d.explanation: Will / be practicing — Future Continuous question: Will + subject + be + V-ing?

videoQuiz1d.text: How much longer ______ the boy ______ the instrument?
videoQuiz1d.explanation: will / be playing — WH- Future Continuous question: WH- word + will + subject + be + V-ing?

videoQuiz1d.text: ______ the father ______ to the violin music for the whole half hour?
videoQuiz1d.explanation: Will / be listening — Future Continuous question: Will + subject + be + V-ing?

videoQuiz1d.text: ______ the boy ______ his practice in the living room all afternoon?
videoQuiz1d.explanation: Will / be continuing — Future Continuous question: Will + subject + be + V-ing?

videoQuiz1d.text: ______ they ______ the music lesson later today?
videoQuiz1d.explanation: Will / be finishing — Future Continuous question: Will + subject + be + V-ing?

videoQuiz2.text: “We’ll be eating and, of course, you’ll be wearing that.”
The speaker is talking about two actions which will happen…
videoQuiz2.explanation: The eating and the wearing of the outfit are parallel actions that will be happening at the same time in the future.

videoQuiz2.text:
Compare these two ways of planning:
A: We will eat and then you will put that on.
B: We will be eating and you will be wearing that.
Which sentence sounds like a step-by-step list of events?
videoQuiz2.explanation: Future Simple lists events one by one — first eat, then put on the outfit.

videoQuiz2.text: Which sentence describes a “simultaneous” picture of the future?
videoQuiz2.explanation: Future Continuous paints a picture of two ongoing actions happening at the same time.

videoQuiz2.text: In this context, is the “wearing” a short action that starts and stops quickly?
videoQuiz2.explanation: “Wearing” is a state that continues throughout the entire dinner.

videoQuiz2.text: Put the words in the correct order:
videoQuiz2.correct: I will be watching the movie and you will be sleeping.

videoQuiz2.text: Create a parallel action based on the video:
videoQuiz2.correct: We will be eating and you will be wearing that dress.

blocks.intro:
We use the Future Continuous for Parallel Actions to describe two or more actions that will be happening at the same time in the future.

We use and and while to connect two actions.

At the party tonight, the band will be playing and everyone will be dancing.
Action 1ConnectorAction 2
I will be studyingandshe will be working.
They will be flyingwhilewe will be driving.

videoQuiz3.text: “I won’t be living with my family anymore.”
Is the speaker saying she will move out at one specific moment, or is she describing her ongoing situation in a year’s time?
videoQuiz3.explanation: By using “won’t be living,” she is describing the state of her life a year from now. It emphasizes that the continuous action of “living with family” will no longer be in progress.

videoQuiz3.text: “There won’t be any family bonding time.”
When the speaker says this, is she making a prediction about her future schedule?
videoQuiz3.explanation: She is predicting that her future (college life) will be missing a specific continuous activity: bonding with her family.

videoQuiz3.text: Where do we put “not” to make a Future Continuous sentence negative?
videoQuiz3.explanation: In English, the negative “not” always attaches to the first auxiliary verb in the chain — which, in this case, is will.

videoQuiz3.text: In the video, the speaker says “I won’t be living…” What is “won’t” a short version of?
videoQuiz3.explanation: won’t = will not. It is the standard contraction used in spoken and informal written English.

videoQuiz3.text: Put the words in the correct order to describe a student who has finished their exams:
videoQuiz3.correct: I won't be studying this weekend.

videoQuiz3.text:
Transform this positive sentence into a negative one:
“Next year, I will be attending high school.” Type the negative version:
videoQuiz3.answer: Next year, I won't be attending high school.
altAnswers: Next year, I will not be attending high school.
videoQuiz3.explanation: Replace will be with won’t be (or will not be) to negate: Next year, I won’t be attending high school.

blocks.intro:
We use the Future Continuous Negative to state that an action will not be in progress at a specific time in the future.

The Formula
Subject + will + not + be + V-ing
    (or Subject + won’t + be + V-ing)

Common Uses:
  • Predicting an absence: “I won’t be working tomorrow, so let’s grab coffee.”
  • Polite refusal: “I’m sorry, I won’t be attending the meeting on Friday.”
  • Contrast: “I’ll be studying for finals, so I won’t be going to the party.”

SubjectAuxiliary (Neg)Continuous MarkerVerb (-ing)
Iwon’tbeliving
Youwon’tbedoing
Shewon’tbebonding
Theywon’tbecoming
examples: I won’t be living with my family anymore.
There won’t be any family bonding time.
We won’t be seeing each other every day in college.

exercises.question: Завтра в 3 часа я буду учиться. Выберите верно:
options: I will study at 3 PM tomorrow.
I will be studying at 3 PM tomorrow.
I am studying at 3 PM tomorrow.
I will studying at 3 PM tomorrow.
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous: будут активно происходить в определенный момент в будущем.

exercises.question: Дополните: "This time next week, she __ __ on vacation."
Выберите правильное предложение:
options: They will be playing tennis all afternoon.
They will playing tennis all afternoon.
They will be play tennis all afternoon.

exercises.question: Выберите отрицание в Future Continuous:
exercises.explanation: Оба - "will not be" и "won't be" - верны.

exercises.question: Дополните отрицание: "I __ not __ reading a book at 7 PM."
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous отрицание: will not be reading.

exercises.question: Какой вопрос грамматически верен?
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous вопрос: Will + подлежащее + be + V+ing?

exercises.question: Завершите вопрос: "__ they __ __ tennis at noon?"
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous вопрос: Will they be playing?

exercises.question: Выберите правильное использование Future Continuous:
options: When you call me, I will eat dinner.
When you call me, I will be eating dinner.
When you will call me, I eating dinner.
When you call me, I eating dinner.
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous для действия в определенный момент: will be eating.

exercises.question: Найдите ошибку:
options: She will be finishing her work soon.
They will be traveling to Paris.
I will be sleep all night.
You will be studying hard next week.
exercises.explanation: Ошибка: "will be sleep" должно быть "will be sleeping".

exercises.question: Выберите правильный вариант:
options: At this time tomorrow, I will study mathematics.
At this time tomorrow, I am studying mathematics.
At this time tomorrow, I will be studying mathematics.
At this time tomorrow, I studied mathematics.
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous для действия в определенный момент: will be studying.

exercises.question: Какой вариант содержит ошибку?
options: They will be waiting for you.
I won't be watching TV tonight.
She will be work here next month.
We will be celebrating the victory.
exercises.explanation: Ошибка: "will be work" должно быть "will be working".

exercises.question: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous?
options: Next year, we will live in Europe.
Next year, we will be living in Europe.
Next year, we lived in Europe.
Next year, we live in Europe.
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous подчеркивает длительность в будущем: will be living.

exercises.question: Какой вопрос требует ответа "Yes, I will be"?
Дополните: "__ you __ __ when I arrive?"
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous вопрос: Will you be studying?

exercises.question: Выберите правильный порядок слов в Future Continuous вопросе:
options: What will you be doing at 6 PM?
What you will be doing at 6 PM?
You will be doing what at 6 PM?
Will be doing you what at 6 PM?
exercises.explanation: Future Continuous вопрос: Question word + Will + подлежащее + be + V+ing?
